description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules directory. Add a before_script that runs "yarn global add codecov" followed by "yarn" to install project dependencies. Define a single stage called test and a job named test that runs in this stage, executing the exact command "yarn unit && codecov -t $CODECOV_TOKEN". The pipeline has no services, artifacts, or conditional rules, and relies on the CODECOV_TOKEN secret for the codecov upload.
